content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč and an integer MMM.

For any valid integers p,qp, qp,q, let's define F(p,q)F(p, q)F(p,q) as the dot product of the subsequences Ap,Ap+1,‚Ä¶,Ap+M‚ąí1A_p, A_{p+1}, \ldots, A_{p+M-1}Ap‚Äč,Ap+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Ap+M‚ąí1‚Äč and Aq,Aq+1,‚Ä¶,Aq+M‚ąí1A_q, A_{q+1}, \ldots, A_{q+M-1}Aq‚Äč,Aq+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Aq+M‚ąí1‚Äč, i.e. F(p,q)=‚ąĎi=0M‚ąí1Ap+i‚čÖAq+iF(p, q) = \sum_{i=0}^{M-1} A_{p+i} \cdot A_{q+i}F(p,q)=‚ąĎi=0M‚ąí1‚ÄčAp+i‚Äč‚čÖAq+i‚Äč.

You should process QQQ queries. In each query:


You are given two integers pospospos and valvalval. Change the value of AposA_{pos}Apos‚Äč to valvalval.
Then, find the sum S=‚ąĎi=1N‚ąíM+1‚ąĎj=1N‚ąíM+1F(i,j)S = \sum_{i=1}^{N-M+1} \sum_{j=1}^{N-M+1}F(i, j)S=‚ąĎi=1N‚ąíM+1‚Äč‚ąĎj=1N‚ąíM+1‚ÄčF(i,j). Since this sum could be very large, compute it modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, MMM and QQQ.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers representing A1,A2,...ANA_1,A_2,...A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,...AN‚Äč.
QQQ lines follow. Each of these lines contains two space-separated integers pospospos and valvalval describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer SSS modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
